230.issue_title: TDD cycle counter resets to 1 on TDD phase re-entry after planning/design detour

deliverables.description: on_exit_cycle_based_phase preserves current_cycle across implementation detours instead of clearing it.
last_cycle remains updated for audit purposes without introducing implicit cycle advancement semantics.
State-engine tests are updated in the same slice to assert preserved cycle behavior instead of reset-to-None behavior.
Focused validation proves detour exit and re-entry preserve the active cycle.

cycles.exit_criteria: PhaseStateEngine preserves current_cycle on implementation detour exit, re-entry no longer resets to cycle 1, same-slice state-engine tests pass, and focused validation for the touched production and test files is green.

deliverables.description: build_phase_guard reads branch state through injected IStateReader.load(branch) instead of direct state.json access.
Cycle-based enforcement is driven by PhaseContractResolver rather than hardcoded implementation-phase checks.
server.py wires the existing state repository and contract resolver into build_phase_guard.
Guard tests are updated in the same slice to the injected signature and corrected behavior.
Focused validation proves the refactored guard path remains correct after the injection change.

cycles.exit_criteria: The guard no longer performs direct state.json reads or hardcoded implementation-phase checks, server wiring uses only injected existing dependencies, same-slice guard tests pass, and focused validation for the touched files is green.

deliverables.description: get_work_context exposes current_cycle only when the active phase contract is cycle_based.
GetWorkContextTool no longer accepts or stores the dead state_path parameter.
server.py drops the obsolete state_path argument from live discovery-tool wiring.
Discovery-tool tests validate the corrected cycle visibility contract in the same slice.
Focused validation proves planning and design detours do not leak preserved cycle state while implementation still shows it.

cycles.exit_criteria: Work-context output hides current_cycle outside cycle-based phases, the dead state_path parameter and its live wiring are removed without compatibility fallbacks, same-slice discovery tests pass, and focused validation for the touched files is green.
